domain: HVAC, plumbing, pump fittings, valve accessories, and building-service mechanical hardware

ideas.product_context: Inline centrifugal pump installations in HVAC chilled-water or condenser-water loops.
ideas.core_function: Straightens inlet flow, captures debris, and provides a compact transition between piping and pump suction flange.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cast or machined diffuser housing with offset inlet, flanged outlet, internal strainer seat, drain boss, and removable access cover interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines non-coaxial pipe transitions, flange bolt patterns, internal seating geometry, angled flow passages, bosses, and service-cover features in one part.

ideas.idea_title: Grooved Pipe Butterfly Valve Gearbox Mount Yoke
ideas.product_context: Valve accessory used on grooved-end butterfly valves in building-service water systems.
ideas.core_function: Supports and aligns a manual gearbox or actuator above the valve stem while transferring torque into the valve shaft.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined bridge yoke with stem bore, actuator bolt pattern, curved saddle underside, anti-rotation lugs, and clearance pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires accurate coaxial shaft features, mixed circular and rectangular mounting patterns, curved mating surfaces, pockets, and orientation-critical lugs.

ideas.product_context: HVAC air-handler condensate drain piping where traps require maintenance access.
ideas.core_function: Forms a water-seal trap section with a removable cleanout connection for clearing sludge or biological buildup.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined U-trap body with threaded pipe ends, raised cleanout boss, plug seat, internal curved passage, and wrench flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests swept internal fluid paths, threaded cylindrical interfaces, offset service bosses, sealing shoulders, and flats on otherwise rounded plumbing geometry.

ideas.product_context: Hydronic balancing valves used to set and preserve flow positions in HVAC distribution branches.
ideas.core_function: Locks a valve handwheel or stem at a calibrated preset position after commissioning.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split collar with indexed arc scale, clamp screw ears, stem bore, stop tab, and small detent pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes split-ring geometry, fine angular indexing, asymmetric clamp ears, small repeated detents, and functional interference-control features.

ideas.idea_title: Pump Seal Flush Port Manifold Block
ideas.product_context: Auxiliary fitting for mechanical seal cooling or flushing on HVAC and plumbing booster pumps.
ideas.core_function: Routes a controlled flush line between pump casing, seal chamber, drain, and instrumentation ports.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compact machined manifold block with intersecting drilled passages, threaded ports on multiple faces, mounting holes, and plug bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with hidden intersecting bores, multi-face port orientation, sealing spotfaces, plugs, and precise passage relationships.

ideas.idea_title: Duct-Mounted Static Pressure Probe Compression Fitting
ideas.product_context: HVAC duct pressure sensing for VAV systems and air-handling unit controls.
ideas.core_function: Holds and seals a small pressure probe tube through sheet-metal duct wall while allowing depth adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined compression fitting body with duct-side flange, tapered ferrule seat, probe bore, locking nut thread, and gasket groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes thin-wall mounting flange geometry, concentric sealing cones, external threads, small through-bores, and gasket retention details.

ideas.product_context: Y-strainers and basket strainers in pump rooms requiring piped blowdown connections.
ideas.core_function: Adapts a strainer drain port to an angled valve outlet while maintaining wrench access and clearance from the strainer body.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined 45-degree elbow adapter with male inlet thread, female outlet thread, hex wrench section, drain passage, and sealing shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests angled cylindrical passages, compound threaded ends, hex-to-round transitions, sealing faces, and realistic service-clearance geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Pressure Reducing Valve Pilot Tubing Bracket
ideas.product_context: Valve accessory for pilot-operated pressure reducing valves in domestic water booster systems.
ideas.core_function: Positions and protects small pilot tubing and fittings around the main valve body.
ideas.likely_main_part: Formed or machined standoff bracket with valve-body saddle, tube clamp channels, slotted mounting holes, and raised protective ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Represents a context-specific bracket with curved saddle fit, narrow tube-retention features, slots, ribs, and installation-driven asymmetry.

ideas.idea_title: Grooved Coupling Sprinkler Drain Test Port Insert
ideas.product_context: Building-service fire protection or plumbing test assemblies using grooved mechanical couplings.
ideas.core_function: Adds a small drain or test-gauge connection at a grooved pipe joint without adding a full tee fitting.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved coupling insert segment with pipe-radius underside, grooved-joint sealing land, threaded radial port, and anti-slip shoulders.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires partial cylindrical shell geometry, radial boss placement, groove-compatible sealing surfaces, and small threaded penetrations through curved walls.

ideas.idea_title: Air Separator Vent Float Chamber Cap
ideas.product_context: Hydronic air separators in HVAC mechanical rooms with automatic air vent assemblies.
ideas.core_function: Closes the float chamber, supports the vent mechanism, and provides threaded service and outlet connections.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined domed cap with large sealing flange, central vent boss, internal float clearance cavity, small outlet thread, and wrench flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines external dome contours, internal cavity constraints, sealing flanges, concentric and eccentric bosses, threads, flats, and serviceable assembly interfaces.
